Kitchen sink: exercises every node kind and rendering policy in one app:
config loads, lifecycle hooks, selection with branch-local config,
providers, middleware, routes, static files, assets, templates, web
handlers, and the serve handoff.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.0.0

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver => HTTPSERVERDIR

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web v0.0.0
)

replace (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper => ASSETSDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations => MIGRATIONSDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web => WEBDIR
)
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/config.go --
package shared

//fabrik:config http
type Config struct {
	Addr string `yaml:"addr" default:":8080"`
}

//fabrik:config log
type Log struct {
	Level string `yaml:"level" default:"info"`
}

//fabrik:hook setup
func InitLogger(l *Log) error { return nil }
-- shared/http.go --
package shared

import "net/http"

//fabrik:provider
func NewServer(cfg *Config) *http.Server {
	return &http.Server{Addr: cfg.Addr}
}
-- shared/middleware.go --
package shared

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http:middleware
func Recovered(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http:middleware name=auth
func RequireAuth(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }
-- store/store.go --
package store

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver"
)

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}

//fabrik:config postgres
type PostgresConfig struct {
	DSN string `yaml:"dsn"`
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Store interface {
	Get(key string) string
}

type Memory struct{}

func (*Memory) Get(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewMemory(c *Config) *Memory { return &Memory{} }

type Postgres struct{}

func (*Postgres) Get(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=postgres
func NewPostgres(ctx context.Context, c *PostgresConfig) (*Postgres, error) { return &Postgres{}, nil }

type Pool struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewPool(ctx context.Context) (*Pool, error) { return &Pool{}, nil }

//fabrik:provider
func NewDB() (*sql.DB, error) { return sql.Open("sqlite", "file:app.db") }

//fabrik:provider
func NewDialect() migrations.Dialect { return migrations.DialectSQLite }

//fabrik:cli:command
func WarmCache(ctx cli.Context, p *Pool) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
func Serve(ctx cli.Context, server *httpserver.Server) error {
	return server.Run(ctx)
}

//fabrik:cli:command
func MigrateDB(ctx cli.Context, db *sql.DB, d migrations.Dialect, src migrations.Sources) error {
	return src.Migrate(ctx, db, d)
}
-- store/schema.go --
package store

import "embed"

//fabrik:migrations
//go:embed all:migrations
var Migrations embed.FS
-- store/migrations/0001_items.sql --
CREATE TABLE items (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
-- web/assets.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:http:static /static dir=static
//go:embed static
var Static embed.FS

//fabrik:assets
//go:embed all:assets
var Assets embed.FS
-- web/static/robots.txt --
User-agent: *
-- web/assets/style.css --
body { background: url("./logo.png"); }
-- web/assets/logo.png --
not-a-real-png
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import (
	"embed"
	"strings"
)

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS

//fabrik:templates:func
func Shout(s string) string { return strings.ToUpper(s) }
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html><head><link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ asset "style.css" }}"></head>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}{{ shout "hi" }}{{ end }}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
	weblib "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"
)

//fabrik:http:group /api middleware=auth
type API struct {
	Store     store.Store
	Pool      *store.Pool
	Templates *templates.Set
}

//fabrik:http GET /items/{id}
func (a *API) Item(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http POST /items
func (a *API) Create(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:handle /metrics
func Metrics() http.Handler { return http.NotFoundHandler() }

//fabrik:web GET /api/items.json
func (a *API) ItemsJSON(req *weblib.Request) (weblib.Response, error) {
	return weblib.JSON{Value: []string{"a"}}, nil
}

//fabrik:http:notfound
func Missing(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
	"io/fs"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
	web2 "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"

	"app/shared"
	"app/store"
	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	root := &cli.Command{
		Name: "app",
		Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
			{
				Name: "warm-cache",
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					pool, err := buildWarmCache(ctx)
					if err != nil {
						return err
					}
					return store.WarmCache(ctx, pool)
				},
			},
			{
				Name: "serve",
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					server, err := buildServe(ctx)
					if err != nil {
						return err
					}
					return store.Serve(ctx, server)
				},
			},
			{
				Name: "migrate-db",
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					db, dialect, sources, err := buildMigrateDB(ctx)
					if err != nil {
						return err
					}
					return store.MigrateDB(ctx, db, dialect, sources)
				},
			},
		},
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}

func buildWarmCache(ctx context.Context) (*store.Pool, error) {
	// Config
	fabrikEnv := os.Getenv("FABRIK_ENV")
	switch fabrikEnv {
	case "development", "production":
	default:
		if fabrikEnv == "" {
			return nil, fmt.Errorf("FABRIK_ENV is required: development or production")
		}
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid FABRIK_ENV %q: want development or production", fabrikEnv)
	}
	fabrikConfigOpts := []config.Option{
		config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
		config.File("config." + fabrikEnv + ".yaml"),
	}
	if fabrikEnv == "development" {
		fabrikConfigOpts = append(fabrikConfigOpts, config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"))
	}
	sharedLog, err := config.Load[shared.Log](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
		config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
		config.Section("log"),
	)...)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	// Setup: after config, before providers
	if err := shared.InitLogger(sharedLog); err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	// Providers
	storePool, err := store.NewPool(ctx)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return storePool, nil
}

func buildServe(ctx context.Context) (*httpserver.Server, error) {
	// Config
	fabrikEnv := os.Getenv("FABRIK_ENV")
	switch fabrikEnv {
	case "development", "production":
	default:
		if fabrikEnv == "" {
			return nil, fmt.Errorf("FABRIK_ENV is required: development or production")
		}
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid FABRIK_ENV %q: want development or production", fabrikEnv)
	}
	fabrikConfigOpts := []config.Option{
		config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
		config.File("config." + fabrikEnv + ".yaml"),
	}
	if fabrikEnv == "development" {
		fabrikConfigOpts = append(fabrikConfigOpts, config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"))
	}
	sharedConfig, err := config.Load[shared.Config](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
		config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
		config.Section("http"),
	)...)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	sharedLog, err := config.Load[shared.Log](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
		config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
		config.Section("log"),
	)...)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	storeConfig, err := config.Load[store.Config](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
		config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
		config.Section("store"),
	)...)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	// Setup: after config, before providers
	if err := shared.InitLogger(sharedLog); err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	// Providers
	sharedHttpServer := shared.NewServer(sharedConfig)

	// store.Store, selected by store.kind
	var storeStore store.Store
	switch storeConfig.Kind {
	case "memory":
		storeStore = store.NewMemory(storeConfig)
	case "postgres":
		storePostgresConfig, err := config.Load[store.PostgresConfig](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
			config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
			config.Section("postgres"),
		)...)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		storeStorePostgres, err := store.NewPostgres(ctx, storePostgresConfig)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		storeStore = storeStorePostgres
	default:
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("no store.Store implementation for %q", storeConfig.Kind)
	}
	storePool, err := store.NewPool(ctx)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	assetCompiled, err := assetmapper.Build([]assetmapper.Root{
		{FS: web.Assets, Dir: "assets"},
	}, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	webTemplates, err := templates.Load(web.Templates, "templates", assetCompiled.FuncMap(), templates.FuncMap{
		"shout": web.Shout,
	})
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	webAPI := &web.API{
		Store:     storeStore,
		Pool:      storePool,
		Templates: webTemplates,
	}
	adapter := web2.NewAdapter(web2.WithRenderer(webTemplates))

	// embedded Static, served under /static
	webStatic, err := fs.Sub(web.Static, "static")
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	r := router.New()

	// Middleware
	r.Use(shared.Recovered)

	// Register
	r.Handle("/static/", http.StripPrefix("/static", http.FileServerFS(webStatic)))
	r.Handle("/assets/", assetCompiled.Handler())
	r.Method("GET", "/api/items/{id}", webAPI.Item, shared.RequireAuth)
	r.Method("POST", "/api/items", webAPI.Create, shared.RequireAuth)
	r.Handle("/metrics", web.Metrics())
	r.Method("GET", "/api/api/items.json", adapter.Wrap(webAPI.ItemsJSON), shared.RequireAuth)
	r.NotFound(web.Missing)
	return httpserver.New(r, sharedHttpServer), nil
}

func buildMigrateDB(ctx context.Context) (*sql.DB, migrations.Dialect, migrations.Sources, error) {
	// Config
	fabrikEnv := os.Getenv("FABRIK_ENV")
	switch fabrikEnv {
	case "development", "production":
	default:
		if fabrikEnv == "" {
			return nil, 0, nil, fmt.Errorf("FABRIK_ENV is required: development or production")
		}
		return nil, 0, nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid FABRIK_ENV %q: want development or production", fabrikEnv)
	}
	fabrikConfigOpts := []config.Option{
		config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
		config.File("config." + fabrikEnv + ".yaml"),
	}
	if fabrikEnv == "development" {
		fabrikConfigOpts = append(fabrikConfigOpts, config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"))
	}
	sharedLog, err := config.Load[shared.Log](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
		config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
		config.Section("log"),
	)...)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, 0, nil, err
	}

	// Setup: after config, before providers
	if err := shared.InitLogger(sharedLog); err != nil {
		return nil, 0, nil, err
	}

	// Providers
	migrationSources := migrations.Sources{
		{Stream: "store", FS: store.Migrations, Dir: "migrations"},
	}

	storeSqlDB, err := store.NewDB()
	if err != nil {
		return nil, 0, nil, err
	}

	storeMigrationsDialect := store.NewDialect()
	return storeSqlDB, storeMigrationsDialect, migrationSources, nil
}
